entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: I must say that 100% confidence of the AI model doesn't make me confident in the results 🤓

entry.title: Re: Please tell more about SAP Commerce Composable Paymen...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please see answers below...

Also , Whether, it will require SAP Digital Payments Addon on SAP BTP? Separate Subscription etc?
Answer: No. Commerce Cloud Composable Payment Framework doesn’t need SAP DPA to run but we will provide an OOTB integration with SAP DPA for customers who have a broader SAP solution footprint and want to handle payment processing in other SAP systems.

Is it possible to implement SAP Composable payment Framework without SAP BTP? or can it connect to any Third party SAAS payment framework?
Answer: Yes. Commerce Cloud Composable Payment Framework is a SaaS solution and provides no code/low code tooling (workbench) for customers to configure 3rd party payment service provider integration. Customers don’t need to have a BTP account.

Also, we can find Open payment Framework in SAP UPscale Commerce , but SAP Upscale Commerce is very different from SAP Commerce Cloud.
Yes. Open Payment Framework is available in Upscale Commerce and it will be now also available for Commerce Cloud customers.

entry.title: SAPUI5 cannot get the value of the Input Tag
entry.content:
Hi

Why the alert is not displaying the text, I think my code is correct, but I don't know why its not displaying the text if i add {ProductID}

heres my code

Odata: Northwind from services.odata.org

Home.xml

                                <VBox id="_IDGenVBox3" class="sapUiSmallMargin">
                                    <Title id="_IDGenTitle1" text="ProductID: {ProductID}" wrapping="true" />    
                                    <Label id="_IDGenLabel7" text="Name: {ProductName}" wrapping="true" class="sapUiTinyMarginBottom" />
                                    <Label id="_IDGenLabel8" text="Available Stock: {UnitsInStock}" wrapping="true" class="sapUiTinyMarginBottom" />
                                    <Text id="_IDGenText1" text="A great description with useful information about this project. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consetetur sadipscing elitr, sed diam nonumy." wrapping="true" />
                                </VBox>
                                
                                <VBox id="_IDGenVBox4" class="sapUiSmallMargin">
                                    <OverflowToolbar id="_IDGenOverflowToolbar1" design="Solid" class="sapContrast">
                                        <!-- <ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer2" /> -->
                                        <Title id="_IDGenTitle2" text="Price: {UnitPrice}" wrapping="true" />
                                        <Button id="_IDGenButton1" icon="sap-icon://cart-4" type="Transparent" press="onAddToCart()" />
                                        <Button id="_IDGenButton2" icon="sap-icon://credit-card" type="Transparent" press="onBuy()" />
                                    </OverflowToolbar>
                                </VBox>

 Home.controller.js

            onAddToCart: function (){
                var productID = this.getView().byId("_IDGenTitle1").getText();
                alert(productID);

            }

Result

but if i remove the {ProductID} it is working fine

entry.title: Re: Is it available the EWM inbound process without HU in...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Colleagues,

Just for further information, for the RF environment, the only option that doesn't include the use of HU is the Packing with WO. 

if you require to post a good receipt by the RF gun as it's possible on Desktop, currently this is not available. 

Please check the KBA below for further reference: 3090827- No goods receipt button on RF environment in SAP S/4HANA Cloud WM

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: recreate clustered indexes on huge table
entry.content: You have tagged this question as being related to SAP IQ but you have also added a tag for Sybase ASE. Clustered indexes suggest this question might be about ASE instead of IQ. Can you clarify if this is an ASE question? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office Variables and Filters via VBA
entry.content:
Hi Regan,

will this work for updating prompts, such as the Fiscal Year / Period Interval?

thank you!

entry.title: Re: recreate clustered indexes on huge table
entry.content:
I think dropping and recreating a clustered index on a large table can impact performance and indexing strategies. Dropping the clustered index affects non-clustered indexes dependent on its order. While recreating it may improve performance for ordered data access

and also specify sorted data during index creation could aid in speed but depends on data distribution.

Adjusting the fill factor, especially from 0 balances space utilization and maintenance overhead and impact insert and select performance. hence experimenting with values is advisable for optimal performance.

entry.title: Re: Regulatory Change Manager: Your Solution to Navigate Regulatory Changes with Ease
entry.content:
Hello Matt and Susanne,

Thank you for your feedback. We will continue working on the tool and improving it, and your feedback is valuable and duly noted. I have updated the blog with a recording of our enablement session so that you can get more familiar with the new features. We have introduced a personalization feature so that end users can pre-select relevant SAP products which is then displayed as per your personalization in the Product Impact view. We have also introduced a list view for the search and filter screen, which should also help you search for relevant regulatory changes and save them as a variant. If you find a bug in the feature, please report it in the LOD-LH-LCN queue, and our team will address it. We are also working to bring over regulatory changes for areas such as GTS. We will keep you posted.

Best,

Shyam

entry.title: Share module nativescript doesnt exist in share scoped default
entry.content:
Hello experts, I'm encountering the following issue when updating my app after implementing the following NativeScript plugin @nativescript-community/audio.

i create the  create a branded client either via MDK SDK and follow this tutorial Add NativeScript Plugins in an MDK App | SAP Tutorial

entry.title: Re: table that stores all variant data
entry.content: If you are doing a system refresh and want to capture / reimport variants into the refreshed system take a look at note 2751575 - How to transfer variants to another system.  Program RSTRANSP

Thanks,

SureshRT

entry.title: FIORI : Is MDG/MDC required to perform Start Mass Maintenance for Business Partner in S4 Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is it possible to perform Business Partner Mass Maintenance without MDG/MDC in S4HANA Fiori.

The requirement is to perform BP Mass Maintenance in S4HANA Fiori.

I've activated below OData Services, related ICF nodes, system alias created and required roles assigned.

ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__1405
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__147
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__194
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__986

I'm in BP Start Mass Maintenance and getting error message as "No process template for goal Basic Mass Update and OTC 147 does exist".

Is Process Template config is must to perform BP mass maintenance?

How this can be fixed.

 

Thanks,

SureshRT

entry.title: List of Materials That Have A Specific Distribution Channel
entry.content:
Hello all - can anyone tell me if there is a table or query that can be run to find a list of all our materials with a given Distribution Channel? I want to pull a list of all our material assigned to a specific Channel.

 

Thank you in advance for any feedback you might have.

entry.title: Opensesame New Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

We have had OpenSesame for quite a few years. Right now they have a new integration that we will need to convert to. Currently, the duration information does not fill in on the item details page, but on the OCN tab. This means details of time spent training is not translating into learning history reports without manual intervention.

Has anyone moved to the newer integration OS offers? Are there any updates to the data loading?

Thanks,

Heather

entry.title: SAP SAC DataAction dimension Member property filter using IF when it has multiple values
entry.content:
I have created a additional properties on Cost center dimension, in one of the property "ALLOCTYPE" has the multiple values and they are separated by comma for further data processing criteria will be defined in Advanced formula. I tried filter those values using If condition something like as follows.

In the given Costcenter dimension property ALLOCTYPE had muliple values for a specific Costcenter based on its usage in allocations.(Ex: "WH","CE"..etc)

CC                    ALLOCTYPE

YYYYY              WH,CE

IF [d/COSTCENTER] = "YYYYY" AND [d/COSTCENTER].[p/ALLOCTYPE]= "WH" THEN

The above statement not producing any results, although it is validated with out any errors. Please let me know if there is any work around in filtering the cost center using its property which is maintained with multiple values.

 

Thanks in Advance,

N.V

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of pl...
entry.content:
Hi Mio,

I tried to replicate the issue again locally but strangely its working on locally but not on deployment.

entry.title: LMS: Default Document Link attached to a scheduled Class based on Doc Link in parent Item?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am a system admin and trainer in SAP SuccessFactors Learning and am trying to find a way for a Document Link (DL) to be added by default to a class without manually adding it to each class or copying a prior class. Is this possible?

Context: We wish to automatically include a DL pointing to a PowerPoint presentation housed in SharePoint to every class scheduled under a specific Item. This would economize class preparation and management for Instructors, and would assist with version control of the presentation. I understand the basics of creating and adding a DL at the Item or Class level. The problem is that a DL added to an Item does not carry down to the Class, so the only options I can currently identify are manually adding the DL each time an admin schedules a Class for that particular Item, copying an existing Class that had the DL attached, or training instructors to locate the Item Details every time they wish to access the PPT.  We would prefer to avoid this simply because of language barriers in the company; meaning, it would be much simpler to instruct how to add a document link once at the Item level and how to access it from the Instructor "My Classes" dashboard in the module.

And as a related question, is there a way to limit who can view the Document Link once it's added to a class? In other words, is there a place for class materials that are intangible but should not be accessed by the Learners?

Please let me know if you need more information about what I'm asking. I know a included a lot in there.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Hana express downloader Options not showing
entry.content:
Unfortunately, it did not help that you posted this new issue as the answer to the original question from February 2023. No one monitoring the "SAP HANA, express edition" tag received that notification.

I received it because I was on a thread from 2023... so I let the product team know about it now.

But I would suggest opening a new discussion in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions with the tag https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+HANA%25252C+express+edition/pd-p/73555000100800000651 in this case.

entry.title: Re: Job Relationship picklist values at manage positions
entry.content:
Hi @myernagula,

There is no functionality to do this in EC. The only thing that you can do to restrict users saving data with picklist values of this type, is via raise message rules. Please check this KBA 2783988 - Can I Hide Certain Values in a Picklist via RBP or Business Rules? for more deails.

If this information helped you, please, Accept as Solution.

Cristian Ocampo

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

My bad. I think I got it. I thought that I can use the checks that are not available in our checked system just to be prepared for S/4Hana Migration. So what I did is ticked these additional options in the ABAP Cloud check system:

Because the Class of these options does not exist in our checked system, that's the reason the error occured.

I now understand how the checks works.

entry.title: Re: Connected Workarea Server not reachable
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

I've just checked my version of the same Connected WA and can access it fine, so hopefully, your version is up and running now too.  If it is not, I suspect that someone on your side is blocking the connection so you will need to get your Network people to take a look at what is blocking the connection.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SAP Associate Consultant
entry.content:
At NAVISITE - Part of Accenture, celebrating our employees and investing in their well-being and development is not just a priority or an initiative - it's woven directly into our company fabric. Our mantra and unofficial corporate hashtag #SoMuchGood is all about recognizing our team's commitment and achievements, both inside and outside the office. It's that theme that has driven a host of programs at Navisite - it's who we are. What we do is simple: We work hard, we have fun, we give back to the community and we never take our eye off the goal - creating a modern cloud MSP with a global, talented team of employees. Join us and be part of our team!!

 

The SAP Professional Services division at Navisite is experiencing unprecedented growth and we are seeking to add to our ranks with the acquisition of new and fresh talent into SAP.
 
We will consider degree qualified applicants, with at least 12 or 24 months work experience, from a wide range of backgrounds to include:
 
·       Finance
·       Warehousing
·       Supply Chain
·       Logistics
·       Manufacturing
·       Production
 
We prefer candidates that have experience in SAP EWM, SAP FICO or SAP MM.
 
Additionally, if you already have experience with other ERP technologies and wish to cross train into SAP, we would welcome applicants from the following:
 
·       Oracle
·       Infor
·       JDE
·       Epicor
·       MS Dynamics
 
You should have a strong desire to succeed in challenging and fast-moving environments and be prepared to travel extensively (80%) to client site throughout the US.
 
In return we offer a unique learning experience with exposure to exciting projects with real hands-on training, delivering value to our customers.

NAVISITE - Part of Accenture - SAP Associate Consultant (lever.co)

entry.title: FIRST CodeJam in Paris - Recap
entry.content:
SAP CodeJam, RAP, CAP is it about a hip hop contest ? Y’all think we can drop some beats to build some Fiori apps ?

… But what the hell does it all mean?

Don't panic! By the end of this article, you'll know it all!

SAP CodeJam is an event organized by SAP Developers Advocates, focusing on the new themes driven by SAP. Participants can explore specific SAP technologies, platforms, and tools through guided exercises and real-world scenarios. SAP experts are on hand to provide assistance, answer questions, and share insights.

We at VINCI Energies organized not just one but 2 CodeJams in parallel, one on RAP and the other on CAP. And guess what ? This is the first CodeJam ever to be held in Paris! We’re making history here, folks!

What an incredible day we had surrounded by our three superstars @thomas_jung , @RichHeilman and @KRiedelsheimer , who shared their passion with us through these handson sessions. The day kicked off with a presentation on SAP's two recent frameworks.

  • RAP (RESTful Application Programming Model) empowers developers with a toolkit for crafting innovative SAP applications. RAP ensures a well-organized development process through a standardized approach by using CDS (Core Data Services) to manage application’s data and ADT (ABAP Development Tools) to design and build applications. Who knows, maybe one day we'll really be able to rap to build applications.

  • CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model), provides developers with a set of tools and guidelines for building modern applications. It makes things easier by providing one way to build both backend services and frontend user interfaces. CAP supports various programming languages and frameworks to help creating flexible and powerful applications

 

Once the presentations were over and the participants had been introduced to these new technologies, it was time to roll up our sleeves and get hands-on. Our 28 participants dived into the tutorial like a kid in a candy store. And we’ve got the photos to prove it!

Just when developers thought they had mastered both frameworks, the 3 SAP advocates launched some scary news: Joule, their new AI! But fear not, code warriors! Joule isn't here to steal our jobs, at least not today. Instead, we've seen some exciting possibilities for how this AI can help us with our daily tasks.

 

To conclude, I let you take a look at this picture, which perfectly describes the enthusiasm our Ninja coders shared throughout the day. 

A huge merci to @thomas_jung @RichHeilman @KRiedelsheimer for making this day awesome, and VINCI Energies for sponsoring such event. Until next time, keep coding, RAPers and CAPers !

entry.title: Re: Improving Time Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: A GenAI Solution
entry.content:
Great point @leonnow100! This will be a wonderful addition to Joule once the extensibility for Joule will be available later in the year. For now, Joule is embedded in SAP solutions and there is already an outstanding roadmap:
https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=FIRST-LAST&q=Joule#Q2%202024

In addition to the Joule-like natural language input, we've added the booking history to the UI, but actually the UI doesn't really matter too much and the functionality could be totally integrated into Joule, once extensibility for Joule is available. This is a customer side-by-side BTP extension for SAP S/4HANA Cloud that can be implemented by anyone on their BTP leveraging the SAP GenAI Hub and a simple yet powerful Business AI use case that you can already build today!

entry.title: Pricing strategy/pricing analysis and optimization solution ?
entry.content:
For pricing strategy/pricing analysis and optimization for a B2B SAP customer , any best practice or tool provided by SAP ? Or any preferred vendor solution ?
Thank you .

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Consume Integration Flows from SAP Integration Suite as Actions
entry.content:
Goal

Call an Integration Flow of SAP Integration Suite from SAP Build Process Automation via Actions.

 

Prerequisites

  • Subscription to SAP Integration Suite
  • Subscription to SAP Build Process Automation

 

One time Setup

Refer to this help page to perform initial setup to connect SAP Build tenant to SAP Integration suite tenant:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/initial-setup-for-action-projects?version=Cloud

In summary, 2 destinations need to be setup in the SAP Build Process Automation sub account. One is needed to fetch available Iflows in an Integration Suite tenant and another to call any Iflow.

Service instances of "Process Integration Runtime" with plan "API" and "Integration-flow" are created. Then a service key for each service instance provides the authorization details to be used in the 2 destinations.

 

Build a sample Integration Flow

Since our focus in this blog is to connect SAP Build to SAP Integration Suite, lets build a very simple Iflow. An Iflow with just one step that returns a fixed JSON payload representing Product data.

Open the Integration suite tenant and create a new Integration flow with sender channel as HTTPS and connection address as "/product". Uncheck CSRF Protected to simplify testing.

 

Add a Content Modifier step that returns Body as below JSON:

{

    "Product": "21",

    "ProductType": "SERV",

    "CreationDate": "2016-10-17",

    "CreationTime": "00:00:00",

    "CreationDateTime": "2016-10-17T00:00:00Z",

    "CreatedByUser": "CB9980000160",

    "LastChangedByUser": "CB9980000160",

    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false,

    "CrossPlantStatus": "",

    "GrossWeight": 0,

    "WeightUnit": "KG",

    "WeightISOUnit": "KGM",

    "ProductGroup": "P001",

    "BaseUnit": "H",

    "BaseISOUnit": "",

    "ItemCategoryGroup": "PSTE",

    "NetWeight": 0,

    "Division": "00"

}

02

Now deploy the Iflow. Switch to Monitoring option and check that the Iflow is in Started state and an Endpoint is assigned to the Iflow. Note: It takes a few minutes after deployment for the Endpoint to become visible.

 

Discover and test the Iflow from SAP Build Actions

Open SAP Build Lobby. In Connectors tab create a new Action. Choose Integration Suite > Integration Flow

If the design time destination was setup correctly, you can now see list of Iflows deployed in the connected Integration Suite tenant.

Choose an Iflow and create a new Action Project. If there are existing Action projects created from the same integration suite tenant then you can also add to an existing Action project.

Now Action Editor is launched with Name, description and the URL of the Iflow auto filled.

Note the inputs and outputs of the Action are empty, this is because the Integration Flow with https sender channel does not define any API specification.

Input

In this particular example there is no input needed so input tab can be skipped. But normally Input fields can be generated using the Add from Sample JSON option. If you have tested the Iflow before then you may already have the sample input payload. Sample payloads can also be retrieved from the payload trace available in Integration Suite monitoring section if the Iflow has been called previously.

Output

Output fields can be easily generated by making a test call in the test tab. Switch to the Test tab and choose the destination ( Runtime destination created earlier) and click on Test. If the destination was setup correctly, you can see a success 200: OK message with the API tab showing the received response. In our example a Product JSON is received.

Click on the Generate Output button to generate the Output fields from the received response. Switch to the Output tab and choose output to 200 to see the output fields that have been generated.

After this the standard procedure of Release and Publish of Action from Action Editor and then consumption of the Action in SAP Build Process Automation can be followed. Part 2 of this Blog can be used for reference on consumption of an Action in a Process.

Conclusion

  • SAP Build Actions can natively discover all deployed Iflows(https sender channel) from an SAP Integration Suite tenant.
  • Https Iflows do not usually provide an API Specification, however the Actions editor can be used to easily generate the Input and output fields using sample JSON or by making a test call to the Iflow.
  • Once an Action is created based on an Iflow, it can be consumed in SAP Build Process Automation just like any other Action created from a REST or OData API.

entry.title: Re: Not able to locate sap:updatable or sap:creatable tag...
entry.content:
Hi Siddanth, 

                      In SAP S/4HANA Cloud or On-premise, the OData V4 specification has introduced changes compared to OData V2, including how metadata and annotations are handled. In OData V4, the annotations such as sap:creatable, sap:updatable, and sap:deletable have been replaced or restructured, and they may not appear in the same way as in OData V2.

Please refer to the following SAP document and follow the section Enhancement of the OData Model.

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/34/1823349ed04df1813197f2a0d71db2/content.htm?no_cache=true

 

Thanks and regards,

Madhu Sangam

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Setting up Inspection Process in Business ByDesign Business Documents
entry.content:
Hi Sandip,

This is very nicely written document. I 'm looking for inspection for customer shipments but its very less applicable in shipment process since its a soft stop and not hard stop or revalidation required if the inspection is rejected.

In our business scenario, for customer shipment, we need to consider the inspection results seriously and hence before the shipment there should be a hard stop or revalidation required . Do you know if we can do any sort of development to achieve this?

Thank you.

Aruna Thakar

entry.title: Re: Change BOM via IDOC
entry.content:
Hello, sadly this did not help, using MSGFN 005 (and 009 both) just ignored the idoc entirely without changing the quantities. 004 adds new entries to STPO instead of updating. Do you have some more information on this, should only specific segments be set to a different MSGFN?
Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Material Master Maintenance

Hi,

Depending upon how you want to use the configuration in your business process, you might want to consider looking at:

- Advanced Variant Configuration

Best Regards

entry.title: API Service layer and its response code list
entry.content:
Hello partners.

I hope you are fine.

I need to find the response list that is used in the service layer api to validate responses (correct or incorrect) but I haven't found anything about it.

For example, the code -2028 is when an entity does not exist in approval process.

I hope you can help me with this information.

entry.title: Re: Enabling Support for Existing CAP Projects in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
@MioYasutake san,

Thanks, I agree with your idea to generate initial version of code (event handler), because I frequently forget is "how to start writing code in this?". When initial version is provided, it is not so difficult to modify what I want to do.

entry.title: I_CurrencyStdVH
entry.content:
On S/4 on-premise system, I would like to create a CDS view of type 'External API' and use I_CurrencyStdVH as the primary datasource. However, this view is not available to be picked as the primary datasource from the 'Custom CDS view' app. Even though documentation/properties of the view state that it is released for key users, it is still not seen.

Is there a reason why this is not available from custom CDS view app? Is there an alternate way to create a CDS on top of I_CurrencyStdVH?

entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multiple pages
entry.content: This sounds great but unfortunately the header, which has been named is not available (in my case) on the table properties as an object that can be positioned to.

entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multiple pages
entry.content: This will only work if your report has a section defined. Many reports do not have sections.

entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multiple pages
entry.content: I did this but the table still stuck to the bottom of the header on the following page.

entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multiple pages
entry.content: In my version of BOBJ, page Headers cant be dragged.

entry.title: Re: How to integrate SAP Digital Payments Add-On into a non-SAP e-commerce solution

I have been checking different SAP blogs ands there is not documentation concerning the ECC 6.0 Digital Payment implementation.

It is very difficult to know the technical and fucntional configuration due to the unexisting SAP Help.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Batch filling Project timesheet for team
entry.content: Hi Dennis, I added the role to my user and try to search these two apps, but still I can't found them in launchpad? did them has been deprecated?

entry.title: SAP API Management - Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API
entry.content:
1. Dear All,

    I am working on exposing an Integration Flow Endpoint as an API using API Management. I've followed several blogs and the tutorial "Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API." However, I am struggling to get my iFlow endpoint to work with certain policies. Could you please advise if you have a good resource or knowledge base that we can follow step-by-step to achieve this?

    Here is what I have done so far:

    1. I added SAP CI as an API Provider using the service instance credentials for the "api" plan. I am using OAuth for authentication. The connection test shows as successful.
    2. My iFlow endpoint is something like https://hostname/http/workorder/status. The API should handle one work order at a time and update the status using the PUT method.
    3. When I created the API Proxy, I selected the iFlow using the discover option, and all fields were automatically populated, including the Base Path.

    My questions are:

    1. The API Base Path was set to /status, and I added v1 in front of it as a version number. However, I believe this should be a unique path across all APIs to avoid conflicts in the future. Can I change this path to something more meaningful, like workorderstatus, considering my iFlow endpoint mentioned above? Would this help avoid conflicts with future APIs?
    2. Do I need to add any resources after this? The tutorial talks about using URL as an API provider but doesn't mention my specific case. If I add a PUT resource, what should the path prefix be? Is it "/status"? I tried using /status, but I get an HTTP 404 error when I try out the API.
    3. Additionally, while adding the proxy, the service instance credentials I used are not the same as the ones I used initially when adding CI as a provider. For the OAuth authentication, I supplied the Process Integration service plan "integration flow." When I test this provider, I get a message that indicates there is an issue. Could this discrepancy in credentials be causing problems with the proxy setup?
      • "System is up and reachable. However, the ping check responded with code : 404; Message : Not Found"
      • However, when I initially added CI as a provider and discovered the flows, the connection test was successful. I used the service plan "api" credentials here.
      • "Connection to the system was successful with response code : 200; Message : OK"
    4. I am also not sure how to check logs or traces to understand why the API test is giving a 404 error. Is there any place where I can monitor what has gone wrong? All I can find are the API analytics dashboards, which show call stats but not the reason for failure or logs. Why is there no monitoring similar to Cloud Integration here?

    I feel lost amidst multiple blogs and help links, and I haven't been able to find a single place that clearly explains how to expose this endpoint with basic policies like OAuth, Allowed IPs, Exception Handling etc.

    Thank you for your help and guidance.

    Screenshots:

entry.title: Character Set incorrect connecting db HANA - Oracle
entry.content:
Hello,

I've got a issue while connecting db HANA - Oracle. I'm getting data from Oracle DB by 'CL_SQL_STATEMENT' ~ 'CL_SQL_RESULT_SET' but there's issue in Character encoding. After '->NEXT_PACKAGE( ). ' statement data fill into abap internal table, but Korean character shows like reversed '?'. Is there any solution for this problem?

I've tried convert( 'utf8') etc,

Also changing character set at t-code 'dbacockpit'.

Both DB's server are on Linux.

Below is tried character set and Oracle Character set is 'WE8MSWIN1252'.

WE8MSWIN1252 / AL16UTF16 / AL32UTF8 / KO16KSC5601 / KO16KSCCS / KO16MSWIN949 / UTF8 / UTF16

Please.. Help

Waiting for your kind reply.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Resetting NumberRange object and drawing number again...
entry.content:
Hello Kostadin Terziev,

I checked dump analysis and there is no dump.

I think the error is causing by calling DrawNumber("TEST") after resetting NumberRange.

Do you have any idea about that?

 

Thank you for your support!

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: Manage your project documentation using SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
HI Sinje,

Nicely articulated. 

One question: 

Can we position Cloud ALM as the right choice of solution for a client to manage their business process documentation replacing Sharepoint starting from its operational phase? I am not sure if we could leverage Cloud ALM starting from the operational phase for a client who is on ECC and currently managing all the documentation in the likes of Functional Specs, Requirement docs, BPD, Test Cases, BPML etc. in SharePoint.

So, we have already utilized Cloud ALM for our other clients for the Implementation phase wherein the project documentation is housed in Cloud ALM from the beginning of the project itself. Another question is that should these clients continue to use CLoud ALM as a documentation repository even after the project implementation phase is over?

entry.title: Re: Part 8 - API Security Best Practices - Threat Protection against SQL Injection attacks
entry.content:
hi @divyamary 

What if there is a requirement to pass in "Free Text" from the app into the API for one/more of the fields? some of SQL keyword is a generic word like select/insert/update/drop...which is very likely to appear in device maintenance app for instance...

Best Regards

Andre Julius

entry.title: Re: EC Time Off workbooks
entry.content: Thank you Lukas for the details on where to download.

entry.title: Kucoin-Empfehlungscode: rMN4U8Y (Neubenutzerbonus)
entry.content: Empfehlungsbonus: Wenn Sie bei der Anmeldung den Empfehlungscode rMN4U8Y eingeben, erhalten Sie einen Bonus, der auf der Grundlage eines Prozentsatzes Ihrer Handelsgebühren berechnet wird. Dieser Bonus dient als Belohnung für die Entscheidung, der Plattform mit dem bereitgestellten Empfehlungscode beizutreten.Empfehlungsbonus: Wenn Sie bei der Anmeldung den Empfehlungscode rMN4U8Y eingeben, erhalten Sie einen Bonus, der auf der Grundlage eines Prozentsatzes Ihrer Handelsgebühren berechnet wird. Dieser Bonus dient als Belohnung für die Entscheidung, der Plattform mit dem bereitgestellten Empfehlungscode beizutreten.

entry.title: How to send HANA DB system to LMDB directly
entry.content:
When using hdblcm to send hanadb system to LMDB, is sldreg necessary?
Is it correct to use Trcd:RZ70 to send data to LMDB?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to send HANA DB system to LMDB directly
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Please refer https://support.sap.com/ja/alm/solution-manager/knowledge-transfer.html
SAP Solution Manager 7.2 初期設定ガイド (SPS9) 
page 269

HANA DB システムを直接にLMDBに登録するために、お手数ですが、以下ガイドのページ269をご参照ください。
SAP Solution Manager 7.2 初期設定ガイド (SPS9) 
page 269

HDBLCMを使用してLMDB の必要な情報を入力する必要がございます。
実行後、LMDB 上で最新の HANA DB の情報が確認できれ ば接続完了です。接続完了まで最大で12時間かかることが あります。

HANA DB システムの登録はHDBLCMを使用する必要がございますが、Trcd:RZ70は不要です。

entry.title: Service Management Tables for Service Order Quotation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to find all the tables of Service Order Quotation in Service Management. How to identify Sold-to, Ship-to or Bill-to address details in Service Order Quotation?

Thanks,

Vamshi Krishna.

entry.title: Código de referencia de Kucoin: rMN4U8Y (bono para nuevo usuario)
entry.content: Bonificación por recomendación: cuando ingresa el código de referencia rMN4U8Y durante el registro, recibirá una bonificación calculada en función de un porcentaje de sus tarifas comerciales. Este bono sirve como recompensa por elegir unirse a la plataforma utilizando el código de referencia proporcionado.Bonificación por recomendación: cuando ingresa el código de referencia rMN4U8Y durante el registro, recibirá una bonificación calculada en función de un porcentaje de sus tarifas comerciales. Este bono sirve como recompensa por elegir unirse a la plataforma utilizando el código de referencia proporcionado.

entry.title: Codice Referral Kucoin | rMN4U8Y | Aggiornamento 2024
entry.content:
Bonus referral: utilizzando il codice referral rMN4U8Y durante la registrazione, riceverai un bonus calcolato in base a una percentuale delle tue commissioni di trading. Questo bonus serve come ricompensa per aver scelto di aderire alla piattaforma con il codice di riferimento fornito.

 

 

 

 

Bonus referral: utilizzando il codice referral rMN4U8Y durante la registrazione, riceverai un bonus calcolato in base a una percentuale delle tue commissioni di trading. Questo bonus serve come ricompensa per aver scelto di aderire alla piattaforma con il codice di riferimento fornito.

 

 

 

 

Bonus referral: utilizzando il codice referral rMN4U8Y durante la registrazione, riceverai un bonus calcolato in base a una percentuale delle tue commissioni di trading. Questo bonus serve come ricompensa per aver scelto di aderire alla piattaforma con il codice di riferimento fornito.

entry.title: Re: ILM: Can you customize Archieve file paths/names.
entry.content:
Hello Ben,

Yes, the archive file path/name can be customized according to your requirements in FILE tcode. For  maximum space in the name range for the archive file, SAP recommends using 
<PARAM_1>_<DATE>_<TIME>_<PARAM_2>.ARCHIVE and my recommendation would be

<PARAM_3>_<DATE>_<TIME>_<PARAM_2>.arc since this enables you to distinguish between the files based on Archiving object name.

For more details of what these parameters mean, you can refer to this link:
https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_gbt10/1.0/en-US/4d/88692f8d7a40ade10000000a15822b/content.htm?no_cache=true

Regards,
Pankaja

entry.title: Kucoin verwijzingscode | rMN4U8Y | Update 2024
entry.content: Verwijzingsbonus: Als u tijdens het aanmelden de Kucoin-verwijzingscode rMN4U8Y gebruikt, ontvangt u een bonus die wordt berekend op basis van een percentage van uw handelskosten. Deze bonus dient als beloning voor het kiezen om lid te worden van het platform met de verstrekte verwijzingscode.

entry.title: Kucoin Referans Kodu | rMN4U8Y | 2024 Güncellemesi
entry.content: Referans Bonusu: Kayıt sırasında rMN4U8Y Kucoin referans kodunu kullandığınızda, işlem ücretlerinizin yüzdesine göre hesaplanan bir bonus alacaksınız. Bu bonus, sağlanan yönlendirme koduyla platforma katılmayı seçtiğiniz için bir ödül olarak hizmet eder.         Referans Bonusu: Kayıt sırasında rMN4U8Y Kucoin referans kodunu kullandığınızda, işlem ücretlerinizin yüzdesine göre hesaplanan bir bonus alacaksınız. Bu bonus, sağlanan yönlendirme koduyla platforma katılmayı seçtiğiniz için bir ödül olarak hizmet eder.

entry.title: Kod Rujukan Kucoin | rMN4U8Y | Kemas kini 2024
entry.content: Bonus Rujukan: Setelah menggunakan kod rujukan Kucoin rMN4U8Y semasa pendaftaran, anda akan menerima bonus yang dikira berdasarkan peratusan yuran dagangan anda. Bonus ini berfungsi sebagai ganjaran kerana memilih untuk menyertai platform dengan kod rujukan yang disediakan.Bonus Rujukan: Setelah menggunakan kod rujukan Kucoin rMN4U8Y semasa pendaftaran, anda akan menerima bonus yang dikira berdasarkan peratusan yuran dagangan anda. Bonus ini berfungsi sebagai ganjaran kerana memilih untuk menyertai platform dengan kod rujukan yang disediakan.Bonus Rujukan: Setelah menggunakan kod rujukan Kucoin rMN4U8Y semasa pendaftaran, anda akan menerima bonus yang dikira berdasarkan peratusan yuran dagangan anda. Bonus ini berfungsi sebagai ganjaran kerana memilih untuk menyertai platform dengan kod rujukan yang disediakan.

entry.title: 销售订单权限删除控制
entry.content:
业务需求

在S/4 HANA CLOUD标准权限管理中，创建更改和删除权限放在了一起进行配置，有一些客户会有独立删除权限管理的需求，比如：销售订单做了集成，当销售订单在S/4创建完成后，外围系统根据集成自动创建销售订单，并且后续流程在外围系统运行。此时有员工误操作在S/4中删除了订单，由于集成脚本一般设置在凌晨自动运行，外围系统接收到订单删除的信息会滞后，所以有些客户会希望通过权限管理来锁住用户误操作删除订单的行为。

系统实现

1.通过BADI：Check of Sales Document Items Before Deletion，案例对用户ID：CB9980000025和CB9980000035限制删除销售订单权限控制，ID：CB998XXXXXXX可以在APP维护业务用户中找到用户对应ID。

if documentprocessingmode = 'CREATE'.
else.
       if cl_abap_context_info=>get_user_technical_name( ) = 'CB9980000025' or  cl_abap_context_info=>get_user_technical_name( ) = 'CB9980000035'.
       no_deletion = 'X'.
       append value #( messagetype = 'I'
                                 messagetext = |Deletion for item | &
                                                         |{ salesdocumentitem-salesdocumentitem } | &
                                                         |not allowed.| )
                                 to messages.
       endif.
endif.

2.当销售订单删除时，报错控制

 

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: Subscription products event log
entry.content:
Hi @alberto_chesa ,

You could use search API to filter the products that were created or changed on or after a specified date, but currently there's no record for "who changed a product" in subscription product.

Please refer to the API document for more details: https://api.sap.com/api/Product_APIs/path/getProductBySearchTermUsingGET

Best regards,

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center - Preparing Transport Request from Source tenant
entry.content:
can we transport basic user with configuration transport center ? 

when implementing Performance & Talent, it's a good practice that processes are launched by a technical user rather than a real user to prevent any problem when the employee leaves or is terminated.

If not, i know the other way is to do an employee export, filter out these specific user and on the other side do an employee import but it would be good to have all in 1 request rather 1 big request and X small requests if forgotten turn an happy customer to a frustrated customer

entry.title: Kod polecający Kucoin | rMN4U8Y | Aktualizacja 2024
entry.content: Bonus za polecenie: Po użyciu kodu polecającego Kucoin rMN4U8Y podczas rejestracji otrzymasz bonus obliczony na podstawie procentu Twoich opłat transakcyjnych. Bonus ten służy jako nagroda za decyzję o dołączeniu do platformy za pomocą dostarczonego kodu polecającego.

entry.title: Kucoin 추천 코드 | rMN4U8Y | 2024년 업데이트
entry.content:
추천 보너스: 가입 시 Kucoin 추천 코드 rMN4U8Y를 사용하면 거래 수수료의 일정 비율을 기준으로 계산된 보너스를 받게 됩니다. 이 보너스는 제공된 추천 코드를 사용하여 플랫폼에 가입하기로 선택한 것에 대한 보상으로 사용됩니다.

 

 

 

 

추천 보너스: 가입 시 Kucoin 추천 코드 rMN4U8Y를 사용하면 거래 수수료의 일정 비율을 기준으로 계산된 보너스를 받게 됩니다. 이 보너스는 제공된 추천 코드를 사용하여 플랫폼에 가입하기로 선택한 것에 대한 보상으로 사용됩니다.

entry.title: Kode Referensi Kucoin | rMN4U8Y | Pembaruan 2024
entry.content: Bonus Referensi: Setelah menggunakan kode referensi Kucoin rMN4U8Y saat mendaftar, Anda akan menerima bonus yang dihitung berdasarkan persentase biaya perdagangan Anda. Bonus ini berfungsi sebagai hadiah karena memilih bergabung dengan platform dengan kode referensi yang disediakan.

entry.title: Re: FIORI : Is MDG/MDC required to perform Start Mass Mai...
entry.content:
Hi Suresh,

you need to configure MDC, i.e activate the BC Sets related to MDC and the odata services.

 Regards

 Anirban

entry.title: Re: Pricing Procedures in Accounts Payable
entry.content:
Hello @Sourav1999 

The blog is simple and easy to understand.

There are changes that you need to make as some of the points mentioned are  incorrect:

1. The Pricing schema that you have mentioned is related to Purchasing related order, which would fit into a persona of Purchasing Manager, Buyer or a Purchasing Specialist. It would definitely not fit into Accounts Payable, which would be used by Invoice Processor (Clerk), Accounts Payable Manager, Payment Clerk etc.  You might want to update the blog.

2. You have mentioned purchasing condition type to represent various types of costs such as freight and other costs. This is not correct all the time. There may be certain conditions which might be statistical in nature and may not be recorded in books of accounts. Similarly, there would be condition types which might be related to procurement of materials, in which case, the account determination would be to a current asset account in balance sheet (Inventory Accounts). Similarly would be the case with condition type for taxes and import duties.

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Create SAP APIM Proxy with SAP Cloud Integration as a Provider using OAuth2ClientCredentials
entry.content:
Hi Anuj - In this screen when you test, is the below a correct a response?

System is up and reachable. However, the ping check responded with code : 404; Message : Not Found

entry.title: Re: Material Master Maintenance
entry.content:
Hi

Specifically related to assets, you would specifically show them as fixed assets in the balance sheet and not inventory. The other way would be to  use material group based account determination

Automatic Account Determination for without materi... - SAP Community

You could post it as expense initially and later on move the same to CWIP or fixed asset based on when you want to capitalize it or book the same into CWIP. Your accounting business owner should be able to help.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Interactive Reporting Dashboard for SAP Cloud Integration using SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @Pecoros ,

Yes, indeed. I don’t remember the exact limit but we have had the same issue.

You can either extract more often, meaning you are going to extract less data each time and not go over the limit, or maybe exclude from the extraction some iFlow that is not interesting for the monitor (if it makes sense for you)

Hope it helps

Javier

entry.title: Maintenance Order Complete window not showing Completion Date fields
entry.content:
Hi,

While doing TECO against a Maintenance Order created automatically from a Plan, the Completion Date and Time fields are not appearing on top right as shown below:

When I access my other system, it shows as follows:

What configurations am i missing in the other system since these fields are standard fields and in both cases Orders generated directly from Maintenance Plans.

Thanking in advance

BR

entry.title: Re: Crystal report 2020 is 64 bit while it's Report Defin...
entry.content:
I believe it's just an oversite from R&D, they never updated the info in the export.

I'll ping the developers and get them to fix it.

The export is only available from the designer so it's not that important...

Thanks for reporting it.

entry.title: How to archive production order in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
How to archive production order in S/4HANA Cloud system. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to archive production order in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Please refer to KBA : 
https://me.sap.com/notes/3472493

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal reports for Eclipse - support
entry.content:
That is normal, CR for Eclipse is standalone, can't connect to BOE. Product just never reversioned it.

As you noticed If you use the JARS from BOE they are version 14, you can't mix them.

entry.title: Re: Waiting for Lock in crpe32.dll
entry.content:
Hi Patrick,

I did a search on the API and nothing really relevant for that error, only suggestion I can see if it's due to the Engine being busy.

Could be a message box showing up on a second screen or could be no try/catch catching the error, or similar.

Or using the try/catch (Exception ex) or this one if (ex.InnerException.Message != null) may catch more info.

As some of the posts noted be sure to close and dispose of the instance of the report and all attached processes etc.

If is threading can't you just kill the one thread?

You need to do more debugging and add logging code to see if you can figure out the steps to reproduce.

Also, you need to use the latest SP, R&D won't patch this product so you need to duplicate the issue with the latest release.

Don

entry.title: Re: FIORI : Is MDG/MDC required to perform Start Mass Mai...
entry.content:
Hello Anirban Roy,

Thank you so much for your response and the blog Mass processing of Business Partners using MDC in FIORI(Part-1).

I followed your blog, however unable to get the desired results. Is there any other config to be performed, other than mentioned in the Part 1 blog. Please advise.

Is MDC config required for Start Mass Maintenance as well. Kindly inform.

Regards,

SureshRT

entry.title: Re: How to export data from SAP Datasphere or its databas...
entry.content: You can create a connection to Oracal DB in Datasphere, then use replication flow to copy the data to Oracle DB.

entry.title: Re: Is there is a way to bring data from Employee Central...
entry.content:
Hi SAC experts,

It seems, the only two options to get the Employee Central Payroll data into SAC is via a third party API "EPIUSE Query Manager" or via "Flat file upload (SFTP)".

We had to reach out to SAP account manager for the clarification, and we got the above answer.

Regarding the query "Employee Payroll Run Results" visible in SAC, I'm not sure whats the purpose of this standard query, as this doesnt give any data.

 

Best regards,

Umesh Jethwani

entry.title: Authorization to start workflow from GOS menu
entry.content:
Hi all,

I got some issue regarding vendor master workflow. Some user cannot access the  Generic Object Services (GOS) menu to start the workflow. Step to produce: GOS -> Workflow -> Start Workflow

While for me, I do have the authorization. 

I have check the roles and profiles. Found out my account have profile SAP_ALL which gave me All SAP System authorizations.

This is at development server so i have all the authorization. Since this profiles cannot be assign to the user at live server, which roles/profiles can I assign to the user so they can start the workflow? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Hana express downloader Options not showing
entry.content: fixed, sorry for the inconvenience

entry.title: SAP CAP - SELECT on views with join and/or union is not supported"
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a CAP service with a service defined as a view as follows:

 

 

entity servicesView     as(

        select from dm.ZPMSITESERV as services
        left join dm.T001 as companies
            on services.ZZSELLER = companies.BUKRS
        left join dm.BUT000 as businessPartners
            on services.ZZBUSINESSPRTNR = businessPartners.PARTNER
        left join dm.ZPMSERVINVST as invoiceStatuses
            on services.ZZINV_STATUS = invoiceStatuses.INVST

        {
            services.ZZIDINTERN        as serviceId,
            services.ZZSERVID          as serviceName,
            services.LEGACYIDINTERN    as legacyId,
            services.ZZSERVICE_CATALOG as catalogId,
            services.ZZCREATIONDATE    as createdOn,
            services.ZZSTARTDATE       as startDate,
            services.ZZENDDATE         as endDate,
            services.ZZSELLER          as companyCode,
            companies.BUTXT            as companyName,
            services.ZZBUSINESSPRTNR   as customerId,
            businessPartners.NAME_ORG1 as customerName,
            services.ZZBUSINESS_LINE   as businessLine,
            services.ZZOPPORTUNITY     as opportunity,
            services.AGREEMENT         as agreement,
            services.OPE_CONTRACT      as opeContract,
            services.ZZOPERACONTRA     as operativeContract,
            services.ZZCONTRACT_NUMBER as contractNumber,
            services.ZZCONTRATDATE     as contractEndDate,
            services.MODIFTIMESTAMP    as modifiedAt,
            services.ZZINV_STATUS      as invoiceStatus,
            invoiceStatuses.INVST_DESC as invoiceStatusDescription,
        }

    );

 

 

This has been perfectly working and suddelnly  does not work any more as we are getting the error as follows:

SAP CAP - SELECT on views with join and/or union is not supported"

Might have been some update on some cds package but does not make sense it worked and now it does not.

Any idea?

Thanks!

C.

entry.title: Re: Deploying CAP Application to BTP - Socket
entry.content: "Allow all IP addresses" doesn't work to me either...

entry.title: Re: Deploying CAP Application to BTP - Socket
entry.content: "Allow all IP addresses" doesn't work for me either... 😔

entry.title: Re: Performance Impact on sap.m.tree
entry.content:
First, from the SAP Fiori Design Guidelines m.tree shall only be used up to 200 items and a maximum of 12 levels. You are far above that. In addition to the treetable solution suggested before, I could also imagine to use a flexible column layout and display lower levels on the object page. Of course, it strongly depends on the use case.

For the performance issue. More than 2 minutes seems to be way to long. Did you check if the backend is performing appropriately?

entry.title: Re: Execution of task "deploy" on application "cpapp-db-deployer" failed.
entry.content: "Allow all IP addresses" doesn't work for me... re-create HANA either...
